title: Add multilingual support: English, Hindi, and Odia

requirements.text: Create a language context provider that manages the currently selected language (English, Hindi, Odia) with default set to English, and persists the selection to localStorage so the choice survives page reloads.

quotes: Add 3 languages english ,hindi and odia so that viewers can see the page in the required language

acceptanceCriteria: A React context exposes the active language and a setter function.
Default language is English on first visit.
Selected language is saved to localStorage and restored on reload.
All three languages (English, Hindi, Odia) are supported as valid values.

requirements.text: Add a language switcher UI element in the Header component, displaying three options: 'English', 'हिन्दी' (Hindi), and 'ଓଡ଼ିଆ' (Odia). The switcher should be visible on both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts and highlight the currently active language.

quotes: Add 3 languages english ,hindi and odia so that viewers can see the page in the required language

acceptanceCriteria: Language switcher appears in the sticky Header on desktop and inside the mobile hamburger menu.
Clicking a language option immediately switches all page content to that language.
The active language option is visually distinguished (e.g., underline, bold, or highlighted color).

requirements.text: Create a centralized translations file (e.g., frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts) containing all user-facing strings for every component in all three languages: English, Hindi, and Odia. Cover all text content in Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, and Footer.

quotes: Add 3 languages english ,hindi and odia so that viewers can see the page in the required language

acceptanceCriteria: A single translations object maps language codes (en, hi, od) to all UI strings.
No hard-coded English strings remain in any page component (all text is sourced from the translations object).
Translations cover headings, body text, button labels, form placeholders and labels, footer details, and section descriptions.

requirements.text: Update all page-section components (Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, Header) to consume translated strings from the language context instead of rendering hard-coded text, so the entire page re-renders in the selected language when the user switches.

quotes: Add 3 languages english ,hindi and odia so that viewers can see the page in the required language

acceptanceCriteria: Switching to Hindi renders all visible text in Hindi across every section.
Switching to Odia renders all visible text in Odia across every section.
Switching back to English renders all visible text in English.
The language switch is instant (no page reload required).
Form validation messages and placeholder text also update with the selected language.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Backend (backend/main.mo) must not be changed — language switching is purely a frontend concern.
The existing visual design, animations, and layout must remain intact.
nonGoals: Server-side rendering or URL-based locale routing.
Adding any language other than English, Hindi, and Odia.
Translating dynamically fetched backend data (lead submissions, etc.).
